title: Set access passphrase to 'Nobita'

requirements.text: Update the hardcoded passphrase in the backend actor so that the access verification function accepts exactly 'Nobita' as the valid passphrase. Remove or replace any previously set passphrase value.
acceptanceCriteria: The verifyPassphrase (or equivalent) function in backend/main.mo returns true only when the input is exactly 'Nobita'.
Any other input returns false and access is denied.
The lock screen on the frontend correctly grants access when 'Nobita' is entered and denies access for any other input.

constraints: The passphrase must be set to exactly 'Nobita' — case-sensitive.
Do not change any frontend lock screen UI or layout.
nonGoals: Adding a passphrase change UI or admin panel.
Encrypting or hashing the passphrase in the backend.
Any changes to the frontend lock screen design.
